div1.entryFree: Wear, subst. fashion: your good worship will be my bail. No, indeed, will I not, Pompey; it is not the w. Meas. III, 2, 78. motley's the only w. As II, 7, 34. the composition that your valour and fear makes in you is a virtue of a good wing, and I like the w. well, All's I, 1, 219. any toys for your head of the newest and finest w. Wint. IV, 4, 327.
